title: BTS Arirang Comeback 2026: Everything You Need to Know About the Album, World Tour, and Netflix Concert
excerpt: BTS returns with their fifth studio album Arirang on March 20, 2026, followed by a free Netflix live concert from Gwanghwamun Square and an 82-date world tour spanning 34 cities. Your complete guide to the biggest comeback in K-Pop history.

title: Boyfriend on Demand: Jisoo's Netflix K-Drama Everyone Is Talking About — Complete Guide
excerpt: Blackpink's Jisoo stars alongside Seo In-guk in Netflix's romantic comedy Boyfriend on Demand, premiering March 6, 2026. From virtual dating simulations to real-world sparks, here is everything you need to know.

title: Top 7 K-Beauty Trends Dominating 2026: PDRN, Exosomes, and the Science Behind Korean Skincare's Revolution
excerpt: From salmon-derived PDRN serums to exosome therapy and Medicube's viral AGE-R device, K-Beauty in 2026 is more science-driven than ever. Discover the top 7 trends reshaping the global skincare industry.

title: How the Iran War Is Hitting South Korea: Oil Prices, Won Currency, and What Ordinary Koreans Face Next
excerpt: South Korea imports 70% of its crude oil from the Middle East. With the Strait of Hormuz effectively shut down and Brent crude surging past $79, here is how the Iran war is directly impacting the Korean economy and daily life.

title: 25 Essential Korean Phrases Every BTS Fan Needs for the Arirang World Tour 2026
excerpt: Heading to a BTS Arirang World Tour concert? Master these 25 essential Korean phrases from fan chants and lightstick commands to survival expressions and connect with fellow ARMY like a native speaker.
